definition: A standard dependent-origination link expressed as a conditional relation.
notes: Use this record when the dependent-arising link is named compactly as jati-paccaya rather than quoted as the full jatipaccaya-jaramaranam line. Keep the link aligned with the repository's updated default of birth for jati, and use rebirth only when the surrounding doctrinal frame explicitly requires that narrower reading.

example_phrases.translation: with birth as condition, ageing and dying

translation_policy.default_scope: Use for the compact named jati-paccaya link inside the dependent-arising family; prefer the dedicated jatipaccaya-jaramaranam formula record when the whole line is present.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not harden jati into rebirth by default, and do not treat this short compound record as the preferred target when the governed full-line formula record already fits the passage.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the terminal link from inheriting an undocumented narrowing of jati into rebirth.
